TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kano_go, title = Kano_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kano_go} }

S.FORM: Kano go maki squ Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 79.75 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 17.39 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0.74 km²), 3,727 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,397 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,998 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 54%. kwara qsahuy na qalang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis qu smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. cyux maki' te hwatong cwongku'. kya' gwagiq na rgrgyax, rroq na b'bu', b'nux ki hici'. cingay sslaq nya' pbkuw sa babaw rhzyal ka spzyang mnanak nya'. 'bwan gwagiq t'aring sasan tehuk lmhngan, mtasaw msngya qu kya', ru hupa' qsya' nya', kya' cingay lahuy pinbahuw nya'. ays ptyaw sebu Kano go ays psgayun 7 ru 7 alang. 7 alang hani ga, Parayapay , Rekat , Efong , Pakala'ac , Pailasan , Salinliw , Kanao'pu . kayal qalang smpung kinhrhur nya' ga 24.5℃. rekisi Maki' sa cingcaw ga ubuy nqu Kwangsyangcyu, muwah Gipun lga 'yugun nha' sa Taytongting kwansancyun luyecwang, masuq pcriq lga 'yugun nha sa "Luye syang". Nanak cyux maki' sa lekwonghwo nqu sangye ki syaye, psqunun nha squ yanping syang ka mglu lwansan cwen. minkahul inu squ sllwan nya' te qutux, sraral ga qnahi' na rhzyal, wahan lmhngaw bbqanux, yasa sllwan nha' "Luye". maki' na' Gipun mga, pzyux bbqanux mwah mqzinah sa Luye , qzyunam m'gaga' nqu Takasagun. Skahul Gipun mita' ga, Luye qani ga blaq wahan maki' nqu kki'an, misu lga blaq wahan maki' nqu lmhngaw ini' ptzyuwaw na komuing. Yasa spyangun nha' wahan lmosay mcisal nqu qalang. tuqi qsya' kya' llyung Luye , llyung Penan. ssquliq pinlpgan mspat seng kinhmayan nya' squ Kano go syang. pzyux ini' ptnaq nqu 'Tayal nyux 'mimaw gmlu maki' sqani. cyux maki' Taytong syeng qu Luye syang, yatux nya' ga cyux msobih squ kwansan cyen, 'zil nya' ga cyux msobih squ haytwang syang, 'llaw nya' ga cyux msobih squ Tonghe syang, kyahu' nya' ga cyux msobih squ yenping syang. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 鹿野國民小學 Luye pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 永安國民小學 yung'an pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 瑞源國民小學 zweyen pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 瑞豐國民小學 zewbwung pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 龍田國民小學 lwongtyen pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 鹿野國民中學 Luye pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 瑞源國民中學 zweyen pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas pqwasan biru 'laqi' seneng tuqi 'san basu' "Tingtong k'yun." qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan Luye eki' spyangan na pinbahu ocya' bulu', ocya' soto' son nah' uzi. mami' bulu'. ulong mtalah. bilus mtalah pngran hwolongkwo gitu' guqoh sikya' bongli' sikya' ngta' luye hmgiru lmosay yasa spyangun nha' wahan lmosay mcisal nqu qalang. 武陵綠色隧道 wuling luyse swetaw 新良濕地 singlyang syti 二層坪水橋 eycen swecyaw 鹿野高台 Luye kawtay balloon Kano go syang ga, te qutux sqqas zyuwaw nqu balloon nqu syang. Flying umbrella Kano go syang ga, yasa inblaq nqu mlaka' na rhzyal ka ini' kpzyux.

Kano go maki squ Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 79.75 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 17.39 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0.74 km²), 3,727 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,397 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,998 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 54%. kwara qsahuy na qalang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis qu smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. cyux maki' te hwatong cwongku'. kya' gwagiq na rgrgyax, rroq na b'bu', b'nux ki hici'. cingay sslaq nya' pbkuw sa babaw rhzyal ka spzyang mnanak nya'. 'bwan gwagiq t'aring sasan tehuk lmhngan, mtasaw msngya qu kya', ru hupa' qsya' nya', kya' cingay lahuy pinbahuw nya'. ays ptyaw sebu Kano go ays psgayun 7 ru 7 alang. 7 alang hani ga, Parayapay , Rekat , Efong , Pakala'ac , Pailasan , Salinliw , Kanao'pu . kayal qalang smpung kinhrhur nya' ga 24.5℃. rekisi Maki' sa cingcaw ga ubuy nqu Kwangsyangcyu, muwah Gipun lga 'yugun nha' sa Taytongting kwansancyun luyecwang, masuq pcriq lga 'yugun nha sa "Luye syang". Nanak cyux maki' sa lekwonghwo nqu sangye ki syaye, psqunun nha squ yanping syang ka mglu lwansan cwen. minkahul inu squ sllwan nya' te qutux, sraral ga qnahi' na rhzyal, wahan lmhngaw bbqanux, yasa sllwan nha' "Luye". maki' na' Gipun mga, pzyux bbqanux mwah mqzinah sa Luye , qzyunam m'gaga' nqu Takasagun. Skahul Gipun mita' ga, Luye qani ga blaq wahan maki' nqu kki'an, misu lga blaq wahan maki' nqu lmhngaw ini' ptzyuwaw na komuing. Yasa spyangun nha' wahan lmosay mcisal nqu qalang. tuqi qsya' kya' llyung Luye , llyung Penan. ssquliq pinlpgan mspat seng kinhmayan nya' squ Kano go syang. pzyux ini' ptnaq nqu 'Tayal nyux 'mimaw gmlu maki' sqani. cyux maki' Taytong syeng qu Luye syang, yatux nya' ga cyux msobih squ kwansan cyen, 'zil nya' ga cyux msobih squ haytwang syang, 'llaw nya' ga cyux msobih squ Tonghe syang, kyahu' nya' ga cyux msobih squ yenping syang. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 鹿野國民小學 Luye pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 永安國民小學 yung'an pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 瑞源國民小學 zweyen pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 瑞豐國民小學 zewbwung pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 龍田國民小學 lwongtyen pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 鹿野國民中學 Luye pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 瑞源國民中學 zweyen pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas pqwasan biru 'laqi' seneng tuqi 'san basu' "Tingtong k'yun." qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan Luye eki' spyangan na pinbahu ocya' bulu', ocya' soto' son nah' uzi. mami' bulu'. ulong mtalah. bilus mtalah pngran hwolongkwo gitu' guqoh sikya' bongli' sikya' ngta' luye hmgiru lmosay yasa spyangun nha' wahan lmosay mcisal nqu qalang. 武陵綠色隧道 wuling luyse swetaw 新良濕地 singlyang syti 二層坪水橋 eycen swecyaw 鹿野高台 Luye kawtay balloon Kano go syang ga, te qutux sqqas zyuwaw nqu balloon nqu syang. Flying umbrella Kano go syang ga, yasa inblaq nqu mlaka' na rhzyal ka ini' kpzyux.
S.PHON: kano ɣo maki s~ɕqu taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara qs~ɕaħuj na qalaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ qu s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ te ħwatoŋ ʦ~ʨwoŋkuʔ. kjaʔ ɣwaɣiq na rɣrɣjax, rroq na βʔβuʔ, βʔnux ki ħiʦ~ʨiʔ. ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕs~ɕlaq njaʔ pβkuw s~ɕa βaβaw rħzjal ka s~ɕpzjaŋ mnanak njaʔ. ʔβwan ɣwaɣiq tʔariŋ s~ɕas~ɕan teħuk lmħŋan, mtas~ɕaw ms~ɕŋja qu kjaʔ, ru ħupaʔ qs~ɕjaʔ njaʔ, kjaʔ ʦ~ʨiŋaj laħuj pinβaħuw njaʔ. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu kano ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, parajapaj , rekat , e*oŋ , pakalaʔaʦ~ʨ , pailas~ɕan , s~ɕalinliw , kanaoʔpu . kajal qalaŋ s~ɕmpuŋ kinħrħur njaʔ ɣa **.**. rekis~ɕi makiʔ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨiŋʦ~ʨaw ɣa uβuj nqu kwaŋs~ɕjaŋʦ~ʨju, muwaħ ɣipun lɣa ʔjuɣun nħaʔ s~ɕa tajtoŋtiŋ kwans~ɕanʦ~ʨjun lujeʦ~ʨwaŋ, mas~ɕuq pʦ~ʨriq lɣa ʔjuɣun nħa s~ɕa "luje s~ɕjaŋ". nanak ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ s~ɕa lekwoŋħwo nqu s~ɕaŋje ki s~ɕjaje, ps~ɕqunun nħa s~ɕqu janpiŋ s~ɕjaŋ ka mɣlu lwans~ɕan ʦ~ʨwen. minkaħul inu s~ɕqu s~ɕllwan njaʔ te qutux, s~ɕraral ɣa qnaħiʔ na rħzjal, waħan lmħŋaw ββqanux, jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan nħaʔ "luje". makiʔ naʔ ɣipun mɣa, pzjux ββqanux mwaħ mqzinaħ s~ɕa luje , qzjunam mʔɣaɣaʔ nqu takas~ɕaɣun. s~ɕkaħul ɣipun mitaʔ ɣa, luje qani ɣa βlaq waħan makiʔ nqu kkiʔan, mis~ɕu lɣa βlaq waħan makiʔ nqu lmħŋaw iniʔ ptzjuwaw na komuiŋ. jas~ɕa s~ɕpjaŋun nħaʔ waħan lmos~ɕaj mʦ~ʨis~ɕal nqu qalaŋ. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ kjaʔ lljuŋ luje , lljuŋ penan. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ms~ɕpat s~ɕeŋ kinħmajan njaʔ s~ɕqu kano ɣo s~ɕjaŋ. pzjux iniʔ ptnaq nqu ʔtajal njux ʔmimaw ɣmlu makiʔ s~ɕqani. ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ tajtoŋ s~ɕjeŋ qu luje s~ɕjaŋ, jatux njaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕoβiħ s~ɕqu kwans~ɕan ʦ~ʨjen, ʔzil njaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕoβiħ s~ɕqu ħajtwaŋ s~ɕjaŋ, ʔllaw njaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕoβiħ s~ɕqu toŋħe s~ɕjaŋ, kjaħuʔ njaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕoβiħ s~ɕqu jenpiŋ s~ɕjaŋ. ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** luje pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** juŋʔan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** zwejen pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** zewβwuŋ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** lwoŋtjen pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ****** luje pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ****** zwejen pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ s~ɕeneŋ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕuʔ "tiŋtoŋ kʔjun." qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan luje ekiʔ s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu oʦ~ʨjaʔ βuluʔ, oʦ~ʨjaʔ s~ɕotoʔ s~ɕon naħʔ uzi. mamiʔ βuluʔ. uloŋ mtalaħ. βilus~ɕ mtalaħ pŋran ħwoloŋkwo ɣituʔ ɣuqoħ s~ɕikjaʔ βoŋliʔ s~ɕikjaʔ ŋtaʔ luje ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj jas~ɕa s~ɕpjaŋun nħaʔ waħan lmos~ɕaj mʦ~ʨis~ɕal nqu qalaŋ. ****** wuliŋ lujs~ɕe s~ɕwetaw **** s~ɕiŋljaŋ s~ɕjti ***** ejʦ~ʨen s~ɕweʦ~ʨjaw **** luje kawtaj βalloon kano ɣo s~ɕjaŋ ɣa, te qutux s~ɕqqas~ɕ zjuwaw nqu βalloon nqu s~ɕjaŋ. *ljiŋ umβrella kano ɣo s~ɕjaŋ ɣa, jas~ɕa inβlaq nqu mlakaʔ na rħzjal ka iniʔ kpzjux.
